Who is Andreea

Not a call centre.
Not a platform.
A person.

Since 2021, Andreea has arranged private flights across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa — working inside top-tier brokerages before doing it independently, on her own terms.

That background matters. It means she knows how the industry works from the inside. Which operators to trust. Which routes have hidden fees. Which requests need to be made 48 hours in advance and which can be confirmed in 40 minutes.

When you contact Fly with Andreea, you reach her. Not a junior coordinator. Not a shared inbox. Her. The same person who sources the aircraft, confirms the extras, and picks up the phone if anything changes on the day.

That is not standard in this industry. It should be.

2021
First flight arranged.
Still going.
3
Continents. Europe,
Middle East, Africa.
450+
Operators in network.
Every one vetted.
1
Point of contact.
Always Andreea.
Message Andreea andreea@flywithandreea.com

Everything taken care of.
Before you land.

On-demand charter
Book within hours. 450 operators. The right aircraft for your route, your group, and your schedule.
Always on
Day or night. First call to final landing. Our team never sleeps so you never wait.
Truly global
Milan to Miami. Tokyo to Tenerife. 90% of the world, covered. If it has a runway, we can get you there.
Included, on select routes

More comes with
your flight
than you think.

Private jet charter with Fly with Andreea includes complimentary concierge services on select routes across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. Door-to-door transfers, champagne on board, fresh flowers in the cabin, gourmet catering — ask before you confirm to see what is already included at no extra cost.

  • Private airport transfers and door-to-tarmac pick-up
  • Champagne and gourmet catering on board
  • Fresh flowers arranged in the cabin before boarding
  • Pet-friendly private jet cabin — dogs, cats, birds welcome
  • 24/7 dedicated concierge from booking to landing

"Ask us before you confirm. What's waiting for you on your route might surprise you."

Get in touch

The things that make
everything else irrelevant.

Champagne & catering
Your preferred champagne, chilled and waiting. Catering arranged to your exact brief — whether that's a light charcuterie, a full meal, or a birthday cake at 40,000 feet.
Available on request ›
Fresh flowers
Roses, peonies, orchids — whichever you love. Arranged in the cabin before you board. A detail most people don't think to ask for. We do.
Ask about your route ›
Pets in the cabin
Dogs, cats, birds, even small reptiles. They travel beside you — not in cargo, not stressed, not separated. Just comfortable, the way it should be.
All sizes welcome ›
Door-to-tarmac transfers
A car from your door to the aircraft steps. No terminals, no queues, no signage to follow. You arrive, you board. That's the entire process.
Select routes included ›
Dedicated butler service
A personal point of contact from first call to final landing. Your preferences noted. Your requests anticipated. Your journey managed so you don't have to think about it.
Available on request ›
Special occasions
Proposals at altitude. Birthday surprises mid-flight. Anniversary dinners above the clouds. We've arranged all of these. Tell us what you have in mind.
Ask us anything ›
Helicopter connections
From the tarmac to the rooftop. We coordinate seamless helicopter transfers from private terminals into city centres — bypassing every road, every queue, every delay.
City-centre in minutes ›
Yacht & villa connections
Your jet lands. Your tender is waiting. We coordinate the full journey — private aviation to superyacht, villa arrival, or resort transfer — as a single, uninterrupted experience.
Full journey managed ›
In-flight wellness
Specific dietary requirements. A particular water brand. A pillow preference. Noise-cancelling headphones, a specific newspaper, a cold towel on arrival. Nothing is too small.
Your preferences, remembered ›
Secure luggage handling
Oversized luggage, golf clubs, ski equipment, artwork, instruments. We coordinate appropriate aircraft and ground handling to make sure everything arrives intact and on time.
Any cargo, handled ›
Medical & accessibility
Stretcher-configured aircraft. Supplemental oxygen. Medical escorts. Reduced-mobility boarding assistance. Private aviation removes the friction that commercial travel cannot.
Discreet, always ›
Surprise & discretion
Sometimes the journey itself is the gift. We manage every detail without revealing the destination — a surprise flight, arranged with complete discretion, from booking to boarding.
Tell us the story ›

4,000 aircraft.
One call.

Very Light Jets to VIP Airliners. Whatever the route, whatever the group, there's an aircraft ready.

From first call
to final landing.

01

End-to-End Private Flight Experience

From chauffeur and helicopter transfers to pet-friendly flights and last-minute bookings, every detail is handled with precision and care.

Learn more ›
02

Transparent, All-Inclusive Pricing

Our independent jet booking platform and in-house flight experts use advanced technology to secure the most competitive private jet prices. You pay only for what you need — no hidden fees, no commissions, complete transparency.

Learn more ›
03

Pet-Friendly Private Jet Flights

Travel comfortably with your pets — whether dogs, cats, birds, or even small reptiles. Our team has extensive experience organizing pet-friendly private jet charters, ensuring safety and comfort for every passenger on board.

Learn more ›
04

24/7 Global Coverage

With 450+ operators across 180 countries and a 55-minute minimum take-off time, we are always ready. Wherever you need to go, we make it happen — fast, reliably, and with care.

Learn more ›

Paris to Frankfurt. Everything you need to know.
How much does it cost?
Paris to Frankfurt starts from around €7,200 on a light jet, rising to €16,500 for a larger cabin. The final figure depends on aircraft positioning, seasonal demand, and any specific configuration you need.
Which airports work best?
Frankfurt's general aviation terminal sits 12 km from the city. Paris Le Bourget — Europe's busiest private aviation hub — offers seven FBOs and round-the-clock service. Both connect to their city centres by helicopter or ground transfer in under 20 minutes.
How long is the flight?
Roughly 50 to 60 minutes in the air. Add 15 minutes at each private terminal — no queues, no security theatre — and door-to-door is well under two hours.
Which aircraft fly this route most?
The Phenom 100, Phenom 300, and PC-12 NG are the most common choices in 2025. All handle the distance comfortably with room for up to eight passengers and standard luggage.
Are there night flight restrictions?
Frankfurt Airport enforces a night ban roughly 11 PM to 5 AM. For late departures, Egelsbach (EDFE) — the dedicated general aviation hub south of the city — is the standard alternative, with more flexible hours for light and midsize jets.
Can I get a helicopter into Paris?
Yes. From Le Bourget, a helicopter transfer to Issy-les-Moulineaux Heliport puts you minutes from the Eiffel Tower and the central business district — typically 10 to 15 minutes in the air.
What's the luggage allowance?
On a Phenom 300 or Citation CJ3, plan for six to eight standard suitcases plus cabin bags. Travelling with golf clubs or oversized equipment? A midsize jet or PC-12 — which has a dedicated large cargo door — is the practical choice.
Can my pet fly with me?
Always. With the right health certificates in place, your dog, cat, or bird travels in the cabin beside you. Both Frankfurt and Le Bourget have designated pet entry points — the process is smooth and unhurried.
Do I need a visa for this route?
Both France and Germany are Schengen Area members, so EU passport holders pass through with no additional checks. Non-EU travellers should verify their specific requirements with us before booking.

Fly with Andreea ›

Questions.

Everything you need to know. If your question isn't here, we're one message away.

Get in touch › Book now ›
How much does it cost to charter a private jet?
Private jet charter prices vary depending on the aircraft type, route, distance, and availability. A short European leg on a light jet can start from around €3,000–€6,000, while a transatlantic flight on an ultra-long-range jet may cost €80,000 or more. Contact us for a tailored quote — we always find the most competitive price with full transparency and no hidden fees.
What is the check-in process for a private jet flight?
Private jet check-in is seamless. You arrive at the private terminal (FBO) just 15–20 minutes before departure. There are no long queues, no public security lines — just a swift, discreet process before you board directly. We handle all the logistics so you simply arrive and fly.
What types of private jets are available, and how will I know which one to book?
We have access to over 4,000 aircraft worldwide, from Very Light Jets (4–5 passengers) ideal for short hops, to Large Jets and VIP Airliners for long-haul group travel. We'll recommend the right aircraft based on your route, group size, luggage, and budget — just tell us your needs.
Can I fly with my pet on a private jet charter flight?
Absolutely. Pet-friendly flying is one of our specialities. Your dogs, cats, birds, or small reptiles fly in the cabin with you — not in cargo. Our team has extensive experience arranging comfortable, stress-free travel for animals of all kinds.
How quickly can you arrange a flight?
We can arrange a private jet in as little as 55 minutes after a confirmed booking. Our 24/7 team is always on standby, and with 450+ operators in our global network, we can respond to last-minute requests with speed and reliability.
What additional services are included on my route?
Before you confirm your flight, always ask us what's included on your specific route. Depending on the journey, we may be able to arrange complimentary pick-up and drop-off transfers, champagne on board, gourmet catering, and fresh flowers in the cabin — at no extra cost.
